# Setting Up a Subscription

Subscription orders allow eligible consumable products, like filters and batteries, to be set up for recurring delivery during checkout, with intervals of thirty, sixty, or ninety days. These subscriptions automatically apply a five percent discount off the regular price to each shipment.

[Source: subscription_orders.md#setting-up-a-subscription]
